name: Khawwat ibn Abdullah
title: Ansari Devotee
shortDescription: One of the brave companions of Imam Hussain (AS) who attained martyrdom during the first attack on Ashura.
fullStory:
Khawwat ibn Abdullah al-Ansari was another star in the Karbala sky and a loyal companion of the Master of Martyrs (AS).

Belonging to the great and noble tribe of Ansar, he reached Karbala out of love to support the Prophet's (PBUH) grandson. On Ashura, he stood with a firm resolve alongside other companions against the army of darkness.

When Umar ibn Sa'd ordered a general attack and a shower of arrows headed towards the tents (the first attack), Khawwat ibn Abdullah, along with about 50 other companions of Imam Hussain (AS), shielded the tents with their chests and fought manfully until they were martyred.

His name is recorded in authentic Ziyarats (like Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya) as one of the devotees of Wilayah.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى خَوّاتِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الأَنْصاريِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Khawwat ibn Abdullah al-Ansari...
